    Not All Vanilla Is Created Equal

    Redefining Premium Vanilla

    Think premium vanilla is just a higher price tag? Ours proves otherwise.  Most “Premium” Vanilla Isn’t Premium — It’s Just Expensive

    Our Bourbon Grade A vanilla from Madagascar delivers a stable vanillin range (1.8 – 2.4%) and a deep, layered aroma that holds through production. We work directly with growers and have a dedicated team on the ground in Madagascar — overseeing curing, quality control, and sourcing new opportunities with local cooperatives. Every batch is air-freighted fresh to our warehouse in Poland, ensuring full traceability, consistent flavour, and zero stale stock.

    No brokers. No guesswork. No flavour drift.

    The Way Vanilla Should Have Always Been.

    Vanilla is one of the world’s most desired natural flavors — used in everything from fine desserts to perfumes. Yet its journey is rarely transparent. Long supply chains and countless intermediaries often blur the story behind each bean, leaving producers unsure about true quality and origin.

    Straightforward answers to the questions we hear most from chefs, manufacturers, and curious creators.

    Frequently Asked Questions

    Do you sell to distributors or directly to manufacturers?

    We work with both — from artisanal producers to large industrial clients in the food, cosmetics, and alcohol industries. Our flexible logistics and packaging options make us suitable for B2B partners of any size.

    Can I visit your warehouse or meet your team?

    Yes, we welcome visits by appointment. We also attend major international trade shows such as SIAL Paris and Gulfood Dubai, where you can meet our team in person.

    What makes your vanilla better than others?

    Our Bourbon vanilla from Madagascar is sourced directly from farmers, offering a rich, complex flavor with 1.8–2.4% vanillin. It’s 100% natural, traceable, and fresher due to airfreight and controlled storage.

    Do you handle TRACES and import documentation?

    Yes. Our company is registered in the TRACES system for import oversight. If you are importing vanilla into the EU, we coordinate the approval process with local authorities and provide all necessary documentation.

    Do you offer exclusivity for certain regions or clients?

    Depending on purchase volume and market strategy, we may consider territorial or product exclusivity agreements. Please contact us directly to discuss partnership terms.

    Are your products certified?

    Yes, we provide Organic (BIO) and Fairtrade certifications where applicable, plus Certificates of Origin, batch specs, and EU 1334/2008-compliant documents for full transparency. Certificates 

    Do you offer other spices?

    Yes, we provide a range of premium spices from Madagascar, for fresh, unique flavors in culinary and beverage applications. With strong roots and a dedicated team in Madagascar, we can source any spice you need—just let us know your requirements!

    How do you guarantee quality?

    We have a team who oversees production in Madagascar, test every batch, and control storage in Poland for consistent flavor. No additives, no “mixes without a name.”

    Do you ship internationally?

    Yes, we offer fast, tracked, temperature-controlled shipping from Poland worldwide. Bulk orders can ship directly from Madagascar (FOB/CIF terms).

    How do I order for my business or get samples?

    Use our website’s “B2B” or “Ask for Samples” forms. A dedicated rep will customize your order, packaging, or logistics needs. You can always just contact one of us using contact apge

    Can I get regular deliveries?

    Yes, our no-contract subscription ensures steady supplies of chef-grade vanilla and spices, perfect for HoReCa or producers.

    Can you help develop custom vanilla-based products?

    Yes. Our team can assist in developing formulations, extracts, or blends tailored to your application — whether it’s for ice cream, chocolate, beverages, or cosmetics.

    Why switch from synthetic vanilla?

    Natural vanilla offers a richer, complex flavor with over 200 compounds, boosts clean label claims, and appeals to premium-seeking consumers.

    What if I’m happy with my current supplier?

    We offer a plan B with flexible volumes, fresher stock, and full documentation. Test our samples to compare without disrupting your supply.

    Typical Problems in the Vanilla Market

    Do you really know what you’ve been buying?

    ⚠️ Low-Grade Material — short, dry pods from outside Madagascar with weak aroma.
    ⚠️ Fake “Bourbon” Claims — non-certified vanilla marketed as premium.
    ⚠️ Unreliable Sources — flavor inconsistency and zero traceability between batches.
    ⚠️ Powders from Waste — post-extraction leftovers sold as “vanilla powder.”
    ⚠️ Adulteration — pastes mixed with synthetic vanillin, tonka, or coumarin.
    ⚠️ Loss of Aroma — oxidation and poor storage flatten the natural scent.
    ⚠️ Contamination Risks — pesticides, heavy metals, and mold with no lab control.
    ⚠️ Greenwashing — “eco” or “organic” claims without verifiable proof.
    ⚠️ Logistics Chaos — unstable supply and cheap substitutions sold at premium prices.
    ⚠️ No Standardization — changing specs, missing COA, and unclear labeling.
    ⚠️ Poor Transport & Storage — no temperature or humidity control, aroma loss in transit.

About Us

The Story Behind Natural Mystic Aroma

WE DON’T JUST SELL SPICES — WE TELL THEIR TRUE STORY.

At Natural Mystic Aroma, our mission goes beyond trade. We bring the soul of Madagascar directly to you — real vanilla, real spices, and a supply chain you can trust. In a world crowded with empty claims and diluted flavors, we stand for authenticity, sustainability, and proof. Our About Us page isn’t just an introduction; it’s an invitation to see how we work, why we care, and how every product we offer carries a verified story from farm to your hands.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp
More Than a Business — A Journey

Natural Mystic Aroma was born from a simple idea: the world’s most extraordinary flavors shouldn’t be hidden. We travel to Madagascar and beyond to bring you vanilla and spices that are as real as the soil they grow in. Every batch is a story of origin, craft, and integrity — delivered directly to you.

Why We Exist

We’re here to do more than sell ingredients. We’re here to redefine trust. Too many products on the market are diluted, mislabeled, or disconnected from the farmers who grow them. We’re building a supply chain that’s transparent from field to final package — because we believe you deserve proof, not promises.

Sustainability at Our Core

We work face-to-face with growers in Madagascar, supporting fair pay, safe working conditions, and sustainable farming practices. Our partners are certified and use natural methods to cultivate our vanilla and spices — no shortcuts, no hidden costs to the planet. Every purchase you make supports communities, protects biodiversity, and leaves a smaller footprint on the earth.

Quality Without Compromise

To ensure the highest quality of our products, we collaborate closely with only trusted producers and implement protective measures throughout the entire process.

- A dedicated team  is on the ground in Madagascar to oversee every step of production, selection, logistics.
- We transport our vanilla exclusively by air to preserve its rich aroma and prevent degradation.
- Our warehouse in Poland lets us repack any quantity quickly and safely, ensuring maximum freshness and reliable delivery across Europe and beyond.

Our Promise to You

When you choose Natural Mystic Aroma, you’re choosing more than ingredients. You’re choosing verified quality, authentic sourcing, and a supply chain you can trust. Every certification we hold is your guarantee that what’s on the label is what’s in the bag — nothing more, nothing less.

Let’s Connect

Your journey with Natural Mystic Aroma starts here. Explore our website, ask us questions, or share your ideas. Email us anytime at  info@localhost

title: B2b
content_raw:
From Madagascar to You — Without the Middlemen.

B2B

Maybe your vanilla has never been stable — one batch rich, the next one weak.

Maybe you’ve relied on synthetic flavorings or pastes because natural sourcing felt risky, complicated, or expensive.

Your job is to keep production moving, specs clean, and costs predictable — not to chase emails and fight with customs forms.

But it doesn’t have to stay that way. We built a direct bridge from Madagascar to Europe, so you can work with real vanilla — confidently, easily, and without chaos

We manage the origin, documentation, and logistics — so you don’t have to.

    We will use your personal data provided in this form only to respond to your inquiry, in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

    We respond to every inquiry personally — no automated replies.
    Your information will never be added to mailing lists or used for anything other than preparing your offer and samples.

    Documentation Download Presentation Request Samples Contact

    Natural Madagascar vanilla – quality that sets your brand apart.

    Natural Mystic Aroma is a direct importer of spices and Bourbon vanilla from Madagascar.

    We are present on-site, working closely with local farmers and overseeing every stage, from harvest to shipment.
    This allows us to maintain full control over quality and ensure transparency, confirmed by BIO and Fairtrade certifications.

    Our mission is to provide artisans and producers with authentic ingredients that enable them to create products of exceptional taste, without compromise – pure premium quality straight from Madagascar.

    Unreliable Availability

    Your supplier runs out again — and you’re forced to buy whatever’s left on the market, often at higher prices and lower quality. Production planning turns into guessing, not managing. Deadlines shift, QA teams wait, and every delay pushes costs higher.

    We built our model to remove that uncertainty completely. We keep stable stock in Poland and ship daily — fast, tracked, and temperature-controlled. For larger volumes, we organize direct shipments from Madagascar (FOB or CIF) to match your scale. You get steady flow, predictable planning, and peace of mind — every single time.

    Disconnected Communication

    You speak to a new person every time. Nobody remembers your formula, and small changes get lost between departments. You end up repeating the same information — or worse, correcting mistakes someone else made.


    You get one dedicated contact who knows your products, QA standards, and production schedule. We personally handle your samples, documentation, and delivery planning — no generic “support@” replies. Our team will also advise you on how to introduce natural vanilla into your recipes and use it more efficiently — improving both cost and flavor performance.

    Price & Quality Instability

    Every supplier promises “Madagascar quality,” but prices shift overnight and batches vary. You can’t plan budgets, and every order feels like a gamble.

    We built a lean supply chain — direct sourcing from Madagascar, verified on-site by our local team, and stocked in Europe for consistency.
    No brokers, no speculation, no price drama — just stable, traceable supply.
    And if global prices or crop conditions change, you’ll know in advance — so you can plan ahead, adjust, and never be caught by surprise.

    Lack of Transparency

    You never really know where your vanilla comes from — or who’s behind it.
    Every supplier claims to work “directly with farmers,” but few can prove it.
    You can’t even be sure it’s real Bourbon vanilla until it arrives — the market is full of mixed origins, repacks, and fakes that waste time and money.

    We have a team on-site in Madagascar verifying every lot at origin, overseeing curing, grading, and documentation. Each batch is checked before export and reverified in Europe, ensuring full authenticity and traceability from the farm to your facility.
    No brokers. No guesswork. Just real Bourbon vanilla — confirmed before it ever leaves the island.

    Trusted by bakeries, confectioners, and ice cream makers

    Why working with us is the right choice for your business

    From artisan makers to international manufacturers — we work with professionals who value authenticity, traceability, and stability.


    Our clients include:
    food and dairy producers, chocolate and confectionery brands, beverage and alcohol manufacturers, nutrition and functional food brands, retailers and private labels, HoReCa, and cosmetics producers.

    Fast & Reliable Deliveries

    Natural Mystic Aroma ensures swift deliveries across the entire European Union through our own warehouse facilities in Poland. This means peace of mind and uninterrupted production for you — and satisfaction for us in being part of your company’s growth.

    Natural Freshness

    We preserve the natural freshness of our products thanks to airtight, food-safe packaging. This allows you and your customers to enjoy the authentic flavor and quality that exceeds expectations.

    Fair Pricing

    We don’t inflate prices, because we value partnership and trust. We want you to work with us knowing it’s an honest and fair choice.

    Flexible Orders

    We deliver exactly the quantity you need – whether it’s 20 units today or 200 next week. Our goal is to adapt to your production rhythm, not the other way around.

    Work with Experts

    You collaborate with a team of experienced professionals who understand your industry and market needs. We advise, support, and find the best solutions together – always with your business in mind.

    Certified Quality

    Our vanilla meets the highest international quality standards, confirmed by BIO and FAIRTRADE certifications That’s your guarantee of ethical sourcing, full traceability, and a responsible choice.

    Lukasz Kedzielawski

    l.kedzielawski@theMysticAroma.com
    +48 665 103 994

    Karol Kucharski

    k.kucharski@theMysticAroma.com
    +48 535 383 223

    Natural Mystic Aroma sp.z.o.o.
    ul. Pamiatkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznan, Poland
    info@theMysticAroma.com
    orders@theMysticAroma.com
    TAX ID: PL7831881805

    Experience the Quality First

    Request Samples

    Fill out the form below and tell us a bit about your business or production needs.
    Within 24 hours, our team will get back to you with a personalized offer — including free product samples tailored to your application.

    Whether you’re exploring our vanilla for the first time or comparing it with your current supplier, we’ll make sure you receive the right materials, documentation, and support to evaluate it properly.

    If you prefer to test our products right away, you can also buy directly from our shop — we offer the same premium vanilla and spices to both B2B and B2C clients.


    And if you’re not sure where to start, check out our full sample sets below  for a complete experience of what we offer.

      Contact details

      Address for sample shipment

      Products & specs

      Select what you want samples of (you can choose multiple):

      We will use your personal data provided in this form only to respond to your inquiry, in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

      We respond to every inquiry personally — no automated replies.
      Your information will never be added to mailing lists or used for anything other than preparing your offer and samples.

      Natural Mystic Aroma – Taste of Madagascar

      Experience the full spectrum of Madagascar’s flavor potential with five premium ingredients: Bourbon vanilla beans, vanilla powder, vanilla seeds, Combava (kaffir lime) powder, and a 2-Fold vanilla extract (available in alcohol-based or alcohol-free form).


      We offer the same premium vanilla and spices to both B2B and B2C clients — the only difference is the scale, never the quality.

      Taste of Madagascar

      ul. Pamiatkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznan, Poland
      TAX ID: PL7831881805

      Our Philosophy — Quality Without Risk

      At Natural Mystic Aroma, we say it clearly: the biggest cost isn’t the price — it’s risk.
      Delays, quality fluctuations, or lack of availability at the most critical moment cost more than any invoice.

      Quality must never fluctuate. Every delivery should be consistent, traceable, and predictable.
      Flexibility should come from the supplier, not the client.

      Fake “Bourbon” vanilla, unknown blends, or missing certifications aren’t just risks — they’re threats to both reputation and consumer safety.
      Clean Label isn’t a trend — it’s a regulatory requirement under EU Regulation 1169/2011.

      We’re not here only for the sale.
      Our team supports your R&D during testing and implementation, helping you transition smoothly to real vanilla — with better flavor, no process changes, and often a lower cost per portion.

      Why Choose Natural Mystic Aroma

      quality, reliability, and full transparency.

      ✅ 100% Bourbon Grade A — large, aromatic pods (19 cm +) from  Madagascar only.
      ✅ Single Origin — stable flavor, consistent recipes, and traceable batches.
      ✅ Whole-Pod Powder — made only from full Bourbon beans, never leftovers.
      ✅ Full Documentation — COA, Certificates of Origin, Organic and Fairtrade options.
      ✅ Strict Quality Control — batch testing, temperature tracking, and sensory checks.
      ✅ Reliable Supply — local stock in Poland and direct shipments from Madagascar (FOB/CIF).
      ✅ Recipe Stability — predictable aromatic profile and standardized quality.
      ✅ Zero Greenwashing — real data, verified certifications, transparent sourcing.

      Typical Problems in the Vanilla Market

      Do you really know what you’ve been buying?

      ⚠️ Low-Grade Material — short, dry pods from outside Madagascar with weak aroma.
      ⚠️ Fake “Bourbon” Claims — non-certified vanilla marketed as premium.
      ⚠️ Unreliable Sources — flavor inconsistency and zero traceability between batches.
      ⚠️ Powders from Waste — post-extraction leftovers sold as “vanilla powder.”
      ⚠️ Adulteration — pastes mixed with synthetic vanillin, tonka, or coumarin.
      ⚠️ Loss of Aroma — oxidation and poor storage flatten the natural scent.
      ⚠️ Contamination Risks — pesticides, heavy metals, and mold with no lab control.
      ⚠️ Greenwashing — “eco” or “organic” claims without verifiable proof.
      ⚠️ Logistics Chaos — unstable supply and cheap substitutions sold at premium prices.
      ⚠️ No Standardization — changing specs, missing COA, and unclear labeling.
      ⚠️ Poor Transport & Storage — no temperature or humidity control, aroma loss in transit.

title: Career / Join Us
content_raw:
Join Our Team — Natural Mystic Aroma Careers

Careers / Join Us

At Natural Mystic Aroma, we believe in building more than just a brand — we’re building a movement around ethically sourced, story-rich products from Madagascar. As we grow, we’re looking for passionate, entrepreneurial people to grow with us.

We don’t just sell vanilla and spices — we bring authentic relationships, cultural depth, and real quality to the table. If that excites you, we’d love to hear from you.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

1. Sales Partner – Europe (Freelance / Commission-Based)

Natural Mystic Aroma is hiring freelance Sales Business Partners across the EU!
Work remotely, represent premium vanilla, spices, and essential oils from Madagascar, and earn commission on every deal — with full product support and lifetime client ownership. Ideal for experienced B2B sales professionals in food, cosmetics, or HoReCa sectors.

Read More

2. Chief Commercial Officer - Head of U.S. Operations

Natural Mystic Aroma is hiring a full-time U.S.-based Commercial Leader!
Help us launch and scale our premium vanilla, spices, and essential oils across the U.S. market. Lead strategy, sales, and expansion — with full support from our European team and direct sourcing in Madagascar. Ideal for experienced B2B professionals in food, cosmetics, or wellness sectors

Read More

3. DE Sales Business Partner (Freelance / Remote / Provisionsbasis)

Natural Mystic Aroma sucht selbstständige Sales Business Partner in Deutschland!
Arbeite remote, vertreibe Premium-Vanille, Gewürze und ätherische Öle direkt aus Madagaskar – mit attraktiver Provision, Produktsupport und exklusiven Vertriebsgebieten. Ideal für erfahrene B2B-Vertriebsprofis im Lebensmittel-, Kosmetik- oder HoReCa-Bereich

Mehr lesen

title: Chief Commercial Officer – USA
content_raw:
Join Our Team — Natural Mystic Aroma

Chief Commercial Officer - Head of U.S. Operations

Help us launch and scale our premium vanilla, spices, and essential oils across the U.S. market. Lead strategy, sales, and expansion — with full support from our European team and direct sourcing in Madagascar. Ideal for experienced B2B professionals in food, cosmetics, or wellness sectors Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

Premium Vanilla, Spices & Essential Oils from Madagascar

We’re Lukasz, Maciej, and Karol — founders of Natural Mystic Aroma, a fast-growing European importer of 100% natural, Bourbon vanilla , premnium rare spices, and essential oils, frozen fruits sourced directly from trusted producers in Madagascar.

We are now ready to enter the U.S. market and are looking for a highly motivated, experienced commercial leader to take charge of our expansion. This is a strategic full-time role focused on launching, building, and scaling operations in the United States.

Your Mission

You will be the driving force behind bringing our premium, story-rich products to American buyers in food production, cosmetics, e-commerce, HoReCa, production and wellness sectors. You will formalize our U.S. sales operations, establish our B2B network, and work closely with the founders to define and execute the long-term commercial strategy.

What Makes This Special

• Direct-from-Source Advantage: Our on-the-ground team in Madagascar builds close relationships with farmers and producers, giving you access to exclusive supply chains, unique products, and direct negotiation power.

• Agile Supply Chain: With fast shipping from our warehouses in the EU and Madagascar, and a nimble sourcing model, we adapt quickly to meet your clients’ evolving needs.

• Products That Tell a Story: Every spice, bean, and drop of oil has a clear origin, story, and identity making it highly appealing in modern, conscious markets.

Our Product Line

• Bourbon Vanilla: Whole pods, powder, seeds, extract (conventional & organic)

• Spices: Combava (kaffir lime) powder, voatsiperifery pepper, turmeric, cinnamon, cloves

• Cacao: Beans, powder, cocoa butter, cocoa bark tea

• Essential Oils: Ylang-Ylang, Ravintsara, Clove, Niaouli, Geranium

• Vegetable Oils: Baobab, moringa • Others

Your Role

• Build and formalize our U.S. market entry strategy

• Develop and manage a U.S. B2B client portfolio • Lead sales, distribution, pricing, and operations

• Represent the brand at U.S. trade shows, meetings, and partner events

• Guide regulatory/compliance needs and logistics for U.S. import (with our team’s support)

• Potentially hire and lead a local sales team

We’re Looking For

• Fluent English speaker, preferably U.S.-based

• 5+ years experience in B2B sales or business development

• Proven record of market entry, scaling B2B sales, or launching new brands

• A leader who is self-driven, strategic, and entrepreneurial • Deep understanding of the American consumer mindset, trends, and buyer behavior

• Bonus: You already have industry connections or network in premium food, beauty, or wellness sectors

What We Offer

• Strategic Role: Be the architect of our U.S. growth story

• Founders’ Trust & Involvement: Direct communication, weekly syncs, fast decisions

• Product Support: Samples, catalogs, documentation, certifications, and logistics already in place

• Strong Margins: Our products are positioned at premium price points, but direct sourcing ensures low costs—giving you generous profit margins.

• Future Potential: As we grow, you could lead the entire North America region

Contact Us:
  • Email: l.kedzielawski@localhost
  • Phone/WhatsApp: +48 665 103 994
  • Website: www.themysticaroma.com

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

Z tej strony Łukasz, Maciej i Karol. Tworzymy młody, dynamiczny zespół i razem rozwijamy Natural Mystic Aroma – firmę, która każdego dnia zaprasza klientów do świata luksusowych, 100% naturalnych produktów spożywczych i aromatycznych, takich jak wanilia Bourbon, egzotyczne przyprawy i olejki eteryczne prosto z Madagaskaru.

W związku z rozwojem poszukujemy do współpracy Partnerów Handlowych, którzy pomogą nam dotrzeć z tymi wyjątkowymi produktami do nowych klientów i rynków.

  • Budowanie bazy klientów B2B

  • Nawiązywanie kontraktów i współprac

  • Mile widziana znajomość języków obcych (szczególnie angielski, niemiecki, francuski)

Oferujemy:

  • Wynagrodzenie prowizyjne od każdej transakcji (bez górnego limitu)

  • Wyłączność regionalną dla aktywnych partnerów

title: Sales Partner – EU
content_raw:
Join Our Team — Natural Mystic Aroma

Sales Business Partner (Freelance / Remote / Commission-Based)

Work remotely, represent premium vanilla, spices, and essential oils from Madagascar, and earn commission on every deal — with full product support and lifetime client ownership. Ideal for experienced B2B sales professionals in food, cosmetics, or HoReCa sectors.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

Natural Mystic Aroma – Premium Vanilla, Spices & Oils from Madagascar

We’re Lukasz, Maciej, and Karol, founders of Natural Mystic Aroma, a fast-growing importer of 100% natural, premium Bourbon vanilla, exotic spices, and essential oils sourced directly from Madagascar’s trusted farmers.

We’re expanding our B2B sales across the European Union and are looking for dynamic, independent Sales Business Partners to build lasting client relationships in their local markets.

With a permanent team based in Madagascar, we’re able to discover emerging producers early, build strong direct relationships with high-quality suppliers, and secure unique, story-rich products — without any middlemen. You’ll have access to a flexible supply chain, fast delivery from our warehouse in Poland, and a portfolio of premium products that stand out in any sales conversation.

Why Join Us?

Sell exclusive, high-quality products with compelling origin stories. Our direct sourcing ensures authenticity, competitive pricing, and sales agility, giving you a true edge.

Our Products (Always Expanding):

  • Bourbon Vanilla: Pods, powder, seeds, extract
  • Exotic Spices: Combava powder, Voatsiperifery pepper, cinnamon, turmeric, cloves
  • Cacao Products: Beans, powder, cocoa butter, cocoa bark tea
  • Essential Oils: Ylang-Ylang, Ravintsara, Clove, Geranium, Niaouli
  • Vegetable Oils: Baobab, moringa
Your Role:
  • Build and manage a B2B client portfolio in your country or region
  • Prospect and close deals with food producers, ice cream makers, bakeries, patisseries, confectioners, HoReCa, skincare, cosmetics brands and others.
  • Showcase product samples, emphasizing quality, origin, and unique stories
  • Negotiate terms and maintain long-term client relationships
  • Collaborate on product strategy, pricing, and market expansion
Who You Are:
  • Experienced in B2B sales (ideally in food, cosmetics, HoReCa, or e-commerce)
  • Confident in cold outreach, in-person visits, and relationship-building
  • Fluent in your local language (spoken and written)
  • Passionate about premium, story-driven products from Madagascar
  • Bonus: Existing network in food, cosmetics, or wellness industries
What We Offer:
  • Generous Commission: Earn on every deal, with lifetime client ownership
  • Exclusive Territory: Secure your region with active performance
  • Full Support: Product samples, branded catalogs, website listings, and fast deliveries from our Polish warehouse
  • Independence: No micromanagement—sell your way
  • Growth Opportunities: Shape our sales model and potentially lead a regional team
  • Training & Insights: Product knowledge, market strategies, and direct founder support
  • Lead support – we help with research, strategy, and warm/cold leads depending on what you need.
Ready to Join?

Send a brief introduction explaining why this excites you to l.kedzielawski@localhost or message me directly on WhatsApp

Contact Us:
  • Email: l.kedzielawski@localhost
  • Phone/WhatsApp: +48 665 103 994
  • Website: www.themysticaroma.com

title: Vertriebspartner:  DACH
content_raw:
Join Our Team — Natural Mystic Aroma

Sales Business Partner (Freelance / Remote / Provisionsbasis)

Arbeite remote, vertreibe Premium-Vanille, Gewürze und ätherische Öle direkt aus Madagaskar – mit attraktiver Provision, Produktsupport und exklusiven Vertriebsgebieten. Ideal für erfahrene B2B-Vertriebsprofis im Lebensmittel-, Kosmetik- oder HoReCa-Bereich

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

Natural Mystic Aroma – Premium-Vanille, Gewürze & Öle aus Madagaskar

Wir sind Łukasz, Maciej und Karol – die Gründer von Natural Mystic Aroma, einem schnell wachsenden Importeur von 100 % natürlichen Premiumprodukten wie Bourbon-Vanille, exotischen Gewürzen und ätherischen Ölen, die wir direkt von ausgewählten Bauern und Produzenten aus Madagaskar beziehen.

Aktuell erweitern wir unsere B2B-Vertriebsaktivitäten in der DACH-Region und suchen engagierte Sales Business Partner, die langfristige Kundenbeziehungen in diesem dynamischen Markt aufbauen möchten.

Dank unseres festen Teams vor Ort in Madagaskar können wir schnell neue Produzenten entdecken, persönliche Beziehungen zu Lieferanten aufbauen und exklusive Produkte direkt an der Quelle sichern – ohne Zwischenhändler. Du erhältst Zugang zu einer flexiblen Lieferkette und einzigartigen, geschichtenbasierten Produkten, die im Vertrieb herausstechen.

Warum mit uns arbeiten?

Unsere Produkte überzeugen durch Qualität, Authentizität und eine klare Herkunft. Durch unseren direkten Zugang zum Ursprung bieten wir wettbewerbsfähige Preise und echten Mehrwert – perfekte Verkaufsargumente für anspruchsvolle Kunden.

Unsere Produkte (ständig wachsend):

  • Bourbon-Vanille: Schoten, Pulver, Samen, Extrakt

  • Exotische Gewürze: Combava-Pulver, Voatsiperifery-Pfeffer, Zimt, Kurkuma, Nelken

  • Kakaoprodukte: Bohnen, Pulver, Kakaobutter, Kakaorindentee

  • Ätherische Öle: Ylang-Ylang, Ravintsara, Nelke, Geranium, Niaouli

  • Pflanzenöle: Baobab, Moringa (demnächst verfügbar)

Was wir suchen

Deine Aufgaben:

  • Aufbau und Betreuung eines eigenen B2B-Kundenportfolios in der DACH-Region

  • Neukundenakquise im Bereich Lebensmittel, Eisdielen, Bäckereien, Patisserien, Hautpflege, Confiserie, HoReCa, Kosmetik, Naturkost und mehr

  • Präsentation von Produktmustern und Kommunikation der Herkunft, Qualität und Geschichte

  • Vertragsverhandlungen und Pflege langfristiger Kundenbeziehungen

  • Mitgestaltung von Produktstrategie, Preisgestaltung und Marktausbau

Was du mitbringst:

  • Erfahrung im B2B-Vertrieb (idealerweise im Lebensmittel-, Kosmetik-, HoReCa- oder E-Commerce-Sektor)

  • Sicherheit in Kaltakquise, persönlichen Kundengesprächen und Beziehungsmanagement

  • Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse (muttersprachlich oder nahezu muttersprachlich)

  • Begeisterung für hochwertige Produkte mit klarer Herkunft und Geschichte

  • Bonus: Ein bestehendes Netzwerk in relevanten Branchen

Was wir bieten:

  • Attraktive Provision – du verdienst an jedem Abschluss, mit dauerhafter Kundenzuordnung

  • Exklusives Vertriebsgebiet – sichere dir deine Region durch aktive Leistung

  • Volle Unterstützung – Produktmuster, Kataloge, Webseitenintegration, schnelle Logistik über unser Lager in Polen

  • Freiheit im Vertrieb – keine Kontrolle, keine Vorgaben: du gestaltest deinen Vertriebsstil selbst

  • Wachstumsmöglichkeiten – entwickle mit uns das Vertriebsmodell und übernimm ggf. eine Führungsrolle in deiner Region

  • Produktschulung & Support – fundiertes Wissen, Markteinblicke und direkter Austausch mit den Gründern

  • Lead-Unterstützung – wir helfen dir bei der Recherche, Strategie und stellen je nach Bedarf warme oder kalte Leads zur Verfügung

Bereit, einzusteigen?

Schicke uns einfach eine kurze Vorstellung per E-Mail oder WhatsApp – kein Lebenslauf erforderlich.

Kontakt:
  • Email: l.kedzielawski@localhost
  • Phone/WhatsApp: +48 665 103 994
  • Website: www.themysticaroma.com

title: Certificates
content_raw:
Certified. Verified. Trusted.

Certificates

At Natural Mystic Aroma, we don’t just promise quality — we prove it.”

At Natural Mystic Aroma, certifications are not a checkbox — they’re our proof. We built our business on transparency, safety, and sustainability because our clients deserve certainty, not claims. Every certification and laboratory test we hold exists for one reason: to give you verified, documented assurance that our ingredients meet the highest global standards of ethics, purity, and performance.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

PL-EKO Certificate (EU Organic Certification – Poland)

This certificate confirms that Natural Mystic Aroma sp. z o.o. operates in full compliance with the EU Organic Regulation (2018/848). It’s a seal of integrity that reflects our commitment to working in harmony with nature — without synthetic pesticides, artificial fertilizers, or GMOs.

While not every product in our portfolio is organic, many are — and every certified batch is fully traceable and verified. This certificate assures you that when you choose our organic options, you’re getting authentic, EU-compliant organic ingredients you can market with confidence and integrity.

[3d-flip-book id="1476" ][/3d-flip-book]

Fair Trade Certificate

Many of our products comply with internationally recognized Fair Trade standards. This certification reflects our ongoing commitment to fair wages, ethical sourcing, and long-term partnerships with farmers and cooperatives in Madagascar.

By choosing our Fair Trade–certified products, you support sustainable farming communities and transparent supply chains — and gain a product story your customers will value and trust.

[3d-flip-book id="1477" ][/3d-flip-book]

Certificate of Origin – Madagascar

Our vanilla and spices are genuinely grown, harvested, and prepared in Madagascar. In a market full of counterfeits and false claims, this certificate confirms true origin and full traceability.

Many suppliers make origin claims they can’t back up. Without certification, you risk paying premium prices for diluted or mislabeled products.

Authentic Madagascar vanilla and spices with verified origin, backed by legal documents. This protects your brand, lowers risk, and makes sure your customers get exactly what you promise.

[3d-flip-book id="1479" ][/3d-flip-book]

Phytosanitary Certificates

Phytosanitary certificates are official documents issued by the Ministry of Agriculture in Madagascar. They confirm that our vanilla and other plant-based products have been inspected, approved, and are free from quarantine pests.

These certificates are required for export and import, ensuring that each shipment complies with international plant health and safety regulations.

For our partners, this means peace of mind: every delivery is legally cleared at customs and guaranteed safe for international distribution.

[3d-flip-book id="1571" ][/3d-flip-book]

[3d-flip-book id="1572" ][/3d-flip-book]

Laboratory Analysis Bulletin

Officially tested in Madagascar by government laboratories. Each batch of our vanilla is analyzed for the two key quality markers: moisture for supple, well-cured beans, and vanillin for rich, natural aroma.

Our results exceed international standards, ensuring authentic, premium-quality vanilla ready for high-end food, beverage, and cosmetic applications.

[3d-flip-book id="1468" ][/3d-flip-book]

Residue-Free Vanilla Certificate (2025)

Independent labs tested our vanilla for over 450 pesticides — none were found. This confirms our clean and careful handling.

Safe, clean vanilla that meets or exceeds European food-safety standards, so you can trust every batch.

[3d-flip-book id="1480" ][/3d-flip-book]

Residue-Free Certificate – Combava Powder

Our Combava powder is tested in accredited  labs with advanced methods, screening over 450 pesticides. The results: no detectable residues.

This guarantees a product that is authentic, natural, and fully compliant with  food-safety standards — clean, safe, and high-quality for food, beverage, and cosmetic applications.

[3d-flip-book id="1478" ][/3d-flip-book]

Allergen Statement (EU Regulation 1169/2011, Annex II)

This declaration confirms that all products supplied by Natural Mystic Aroma sp. z o.o. are free from allergens as defined in EU Regulation No. 1169/2011, Annex II.

Our production follows strict quality standards and Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) to prevent any cross-contamination.
Each batch is verified to ensure compliance, purity, and safety for international distribution.

[3d-flip-book id="2635" ][/3d-flip-book]

title: contact
content_raw:
We’re Here to Help

Thank you for visiting our website

We believe every conversation matters.
At Natural Mystic Aroma, reaching out isn’t just about service — it’s about connection. Whether you want to explore our products, need help with an order, or are curious about working with us, we’re here to listen, guide, and build something meaningful together. Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

LET’S BE CLEAR — NOT EVERY PARTNER IS THE RIGHT FIT.

At Natural Mystic Aroma, we don’t just move products — we move standards. If you’re searching for the cheapest commodity spice, this isn’t the place.

But if you care about verified origin, sustainable trade, and products that truly deliver on their promise, then we should talk.

If you’re looking for a supplier who’s involved, reliable, and invested in your success, fill out the form and we’ll get back to you personally — or contact us directly.

B2B Offer

    We will use your personal data provided in this form only to respond to your inquiry, in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

    We respond to every inquiry personally — no automated replies.
    Your information will never be added to mailing lists or used for anything other than preparing your offer and samples.

    When to Contact Us

    ✅ You’re tired of inconsistent vanilla or diluted spices and want real reliability.
    ✅ Your supplier keeps running out, changing prices, or offering different quality each batch.
    ✅ You’ve had enough of middlemen who disappear after payment or avoid responsibility.
    ✅ You’re ready to work with a supplier who invests in proof, not promises.
    ✅ You’re building a product or brand that demands authenticity, traceability, and trust.
    ✅ You want expert advice on introducing natural vanilla to your production — efficiently and cost-effectively.
    ✅ You’re looking for world-class quality at a fair, transparent price.

    What You’ll Get:

    ✅ Straight answers, no fluff.
    ✅ Direct access to Madagascar.
    ✅ A long-term partner, not just a transaction.
    ✅ Predictable supply and pricing.
    ✅ Support from people who care.
    ✅ Documentation done right.
    ✅ Flexible order volumes.
    ✅ Ethical and sustainable sourcing.

    Email us anytime:
    orders@localhost

    Call/WhatsApp: +48 665 103 994 or +48 535 383 223

    Documentation Download Presentation Request Samples

    Lukasz Kedzielawski

    l.kedzielawski@theMysticAroma.com
    +48 665 103 994

    Karol Kucharski

    k.kucharski@theMysticAroma.com
    +48 535 383 223

    Natural Mystic Aroma sp.z.o.o.
    ul. Pamiatkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznan, Poland
    info@theMysticAroma.com
    orders@theMysticAroma.com
    TAX ID: PL7831881805

    B2B Done Differently

    Custom Sourcing Without Middlemen

    We know price matters — but consistency matters more. That’s why we’ve built a lean, transparent supply chain connecting producers in Madagascar directly to your business. No brokers. No speculation. Just verified, traceable quality at every step.

    With our team on the ground in Madagascar, we handle every stage — from sourcing and quality control to export and documentation. This direct presence allows us to go far beyond vanilla: we also supply cocoa, black and wild pepper (voatsiperifery), cloves, cinnamon, and essential oils, all handled with full traceability from farm to Europe.

    Why It Works for B2B

    ✅ Reliability — consistent quality, batch after batch.
    ✅ Flexibility — sourcing that adapts to your needs, not the other way around.
    ✅ Value — premium ingredients without inflated margins.
    ✅ Direct Access — real connection to Madagascar, not a reselling chain.

    If you need authentic ingredients, stable supply, and honest partnership, we’re here to make it work — sustainably, transparently, and together.

    B2B Offer Karolina, Zakrecone Wypieki Poznan

    Good morning, yes we’re testing 🙂 The vanilla is wonderful!! Both powdered and in pods it’s so aromatic that I overdid the amount for the panna cotta. However, the combava unfortunately becomes bitter after flavoring the cream – though this doesn’t bother much once blended with white chocolate and juice added. I’m wondering if under heat it might work better, for example in yeast pastries. I’ll keep you updated.

    Claudia, SweetArt Konditorei Owner

    I used the extract today and it’s really great. Definitely better than those available on the market – it has an intense vanilla taste and aroma. Of course, you can tell it’s an extract and not the beans themselves, but I still prefer it over artificial substitutes.

    Magdalena, Lodziarnia Verona (Poland) Owner

    Last week we carried out tests and I’m surprised. We easily replaced the paste with vanilla beans, reduced the dosage, and the ice cream gained a deeper vanilla flavor.

    Jakub, Gelato Roma (Poland)

    We added combava powder to our lemon sorbet – the result exceeded our expectations! The flavor became fresher and more distinctive. Customers are asking what this unique note is.

    Thomas, Bäckerei Berger (Germany)

    Bourbon vanilla of your quality has completely transformed our sweet buns and creams. The aroma is intense, natural, and the price allows us to use vanilla every day.

    Petra, Wiener Patisserie (Austria)

    Vanilla extract has proven to be an excellent solution for our mousses and creams – very convenient to use, and the taste and aroma are identical to what the beans provide.

    Jan, Praha Bakery (Czech Republic)

    Vanilla powder and seeds are a great alternative to beans – convenient, economical, and they create beautiful black specks in creams and cakes, which customers greatly appreciate.

    Katarzyna, Piekarnia Karmel (Poland)

    Vanilla extract and seed powder are a huge convenience for us. We don’t have to open the beans each time, and the flavor effect is identical – sometimes even better. Thanks to this, we can work faster, and our baked goods have gained a new, distinctive aroma.

    Michael , Eis & Genuss (Germany)

    Your Bourbon vanilla is one of the few ingredients that truly impacts sales. The vanilla ice cream we make with it sells best and receives the most positive reviews. Customers appreciate the natural taste, and for us it’s a signal that investing in quality is worthwhile.

title: Privacy Policy
content_raw:
PRIVACY POLICY FOR THE NATURAL MYSTIC AROMA SHOP

Natural Mystic Aroma
shop.theMysticAroma.com
theMysticAroma.com

§1 General Provisions

  1. This Privacy Policy outlines the principles for processing and protecting the personal data of customers using the online store available at: shop.theMysticAroma.com (hereinafter referred to as the Store). It also specifies the rules for using cookies.

  2. The Privacy Policy of the Store is informational in nature.

  3. The Administrator of the personal data of the Store’s users, within the meaning of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (GDPR), is:

    • Natural Mystic Aroma Sp. z o.o.

    • ul. Pamiątkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznań, Poland

    • KRS: 0001039186, NIP: 7831881805, REGON: 525446867

    • Email: info@localhost

  4. The Administrator processes personal data in compliance with GDPR, the Act on the Provision of Electronic Services of July 18, 2002, and other applicable Polish and EU regulations.

  5. The Administrator ensures that personal data is:

    • processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently,

    • collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes,

    • limited to what is necessary,

    • accurate and kept up to date,

    • stored no longer than necessary,

    • protected with appropriate technical and organizational measures.

§2 Collection, Scope, and Purpose of Processing Personal Data

  1. The Administrator may collect the following data from customers and potential customers:

    • Email address,

    • First and last name,

    • Company name (for business customers),

    • Tax Identification Number (NIP) (for business customers),

    • Delivery address (street, house number, apartment number, postal code, city, country),

    • Residence/business/registered office address (if different from delivery address),

    • Phone number.

  2. Data is processed for the following purposes and on the following legal bases:

    • Placing orders in the Store / contract execution → Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.

    • Accounting, tax obligations → Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR.

    • Customer service, communication, account management → Art. 6(1)(b) and 6(1)(f) GDPR.

    • Direct marketing of own products/services (newsletter, promotions) → Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent).

    • Security, fraud prevention, ensuring proper operation of the Store → Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).

  3. Providing personal data is voluntary, but necessary to conclude and execute a Sales Agreement or an Agreement for the provision of Electronic Services.

§3 Data Retention

Personal data is stored for the period necessary to fulfill processing purposes:

  • Order data (invoices, contracts): 5 years, in line with Polish accounting and tax regulations.

  • Pending/failed/cancelled orders: 30 days.

  • Refunded orders: 1 year.

  • Customer accounts: until the customer requests deletion.

  • Marketing consents: until withdrawn.

§4 Data Recipients

  1. Recipients of customer data may include:

    • Courier and postal companies (delivery purposes).

    • Entities handling electronic payments (e.g., PayPal, Stripe, Przelewy24).

    • Hosting provider, IT service providers.

  2. These entities process data under agreements with the Administrator and in compliance with GDPR.

  3. Customer data will not be transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA) unless necessary (e.g., when using services such as Mailchimp, Google, Meta). In such cases, transfers are based on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or other legal safeguards.

§5 Cookies Policy

  1. The Store uses cookies (session, persistent, and third-party cookies).

  2. Cookies are used to:

    • ensure proper functioning of the Store,

    • maintain user sessions,

    • adapt the Store to user needs,

    • create statistics,

    • ensure security.

  3. Customers can manage cookie settings in their browser. Blocking cookies may limit Store functionality.

  4. Third-party providers (e.g., Google Analytics, Meta Pixel) may collect data via cookies, subject to their own privacy policies.

§6 Rights of Customers

  1. Customers have the following rights under GDPR:

    • Access to their data (Art. 15 GDPR).

    • Rectification of data (Art. 16 GDPR).

    • Erasure of data (“right to be forgotten”) (Art. 17 GDPR).

    • Restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR).

    • Data portability (Art. 20 GDPR).

    • Objection to processing (Art. 21 GDPR).

    • Withdrawal of consent at any time (Art. 7(3) GDPR).

    • Right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority.

  2. The supervisory authority in Poland is:
    President of the Personal Data Protection Office (PUODO), ul. Stawki 2, 00-193 Warsaw, Poland.

  3. To exercise rights, customers may contact the Administrator at info@localhost.

§7 Final Provisions

  1. The Administrator may update this Privacy Policy if the Store’s offer or regulations change.

  2. Updated versions will be published on the Store’s website at shop.theMysticAroma.com, with a visible notice of changes.

  3. Questions regarding this Privacy Policy should be directed to: info@localhost.

title: Returns & Complaints
content_raw:
Returns & Complaints

We keep it simple and fair.

If something isn’t right, we’ll fix it. Below you’ll find how to withdraw (return) an order within 14 days and how to file a complaint about a product.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

1) Returns (Right of Withdrawal – 14 days)

  • You can withdraw within 14 days of receiving your order—no reason needed.

  • How to notify us: send an email to orders@localhost (or letter) with your order number and a clear statement that you’re withdrawing.

  • Where to send returns: Natural Mystic Aroma Sp. z o.o., ul. Pamiątkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznań, Poland.

  • Refunds: we refund all payments incl. standard delivery within 14 days from the moment we receive your withdrawal notice (we may wait until we receive the goods or proof of return). Refunds are made to the bank account you provide in the form.

  • Return shipping cost: paid by the Buyer.

  • Condition of goods: you may handle the product only as in a store; any loss of value from excessive use can reduce your refund.

  • Exceptions (examples): items made to your specification, or sealed goods not suitable for return for health/hygiene reasons once unsealed.

Download the Withdrawal Form (PDF) – ready to print & fill in. ( bottom of the page )

2) Complaints (Product not conforming to contract)

If a product arrives faulty, damaged, or non-conforming, tell us and choose what you want: repair, replacement, price reduction, or refund (as provided by law).

  • How to submit: email orders@localhost or mail us (address above).

  • What to include: order number, product name, batch number (on packaging), description of the issue, photos if possible, and your preferred solution.

  • Timing: we’ll reply within 14 days and cover legitimate remedy costs (e.g., re-delivery).

Download the Complaint Form (PDF) – ( bottom of the page ) 

Quick how-to (step by step)

For a Return (withdrawal):

  1. Download & fill the Withdrawal Form (or write your own clear statement).

  2. Email it to orders@localhost and send the goods back.

  3. Keep your proof of postage. We refund within 14 days (see details above).

For a Complaint:

  1. Download & fill the Complaint Form.

  2. Email it to orders@localhost with photos (if relevant).

  3. We’ll respond within 14 days with next steps (repair/replacement/refund).

Download Withdrawal Form Download Complaint Form

title: Shipping & Payments
content_raw:
Shipping & Payments

We Deliver Quality Without Surprises.

From checkout to your door, we keep things transparent. Here’s everything you need to know about how your order ships and the ways you can pay—clear, simple, and no hidden costs.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

Natural Mystic Aroma — shop.theMysticAroma.com | www.theMysticAroma.com
Last updated:  1 October 2025

Quick Summary

  • Where we ship: Worldwide. For specific destinations, contact us at orders@localhost.

  • Processing time: 1–2 business days before dispatch.

  • Delivery times:

    • Poland: 1–2 business days after dispatch
    • European Union: 2–5 business days after dispatch
    • Global: depends on destination and carrier

  • Payments: Bank transfer, blik, online card/fast transfer (via secure payment provider), or Cash on Delivery (if available at checkout).

  • Invoices: VAT invoice issued for every order.

SHIPPING

1) Areas We Serve

  • Poland — standard courier delivery and parcel lockers (where available).

  • European Union — courier delivery, typically 2–5 business days.

  • Outside the EU — currently not available via online checkout. For global shipping quotes, please contact us at orders@localhost.

2) Processing Time

  • Orders are prepared within 1–2 business days (Mon–Fri, excluding public holidays).

  • Orders placed after 12:00 are usually processed the next business day.

3) Delivery Options & Typical Timelines
MethodTypical delivery timeNotes
Express courier (Poland)1–2 business days 
Parcel locker (Poland)1–2 business days 
Courier (EU)2–5 business days 
4) Free Shipping

  • Poland — free shipping on orders over 250 PLN.

  • EU — free shipping on orders over 250 EUR

Payments

Here’s a polished version of your Payments section, structured for clarity and professionalism, with all the important details included:

Payments

1) Secure Payment Methods

We partner with reputable providers and apply 3-D Secure where applicable to keep your transactions safe. The payment options available may vary depending on order value and delivery country; the options shown at checkout are final.

Online payments (recommended):

  • Card (Visa / Mastercard)

  • BLIK

  • Fast transfers (Pay-by-link)

  • Other methods offered by our payment partner (e.g., Przelewy24 where available)

Traditional bank transfer:

  • PLN: 28 1020 4027 0000 1202 1856 0681

  • EUR: 74 1020 4027 0000 1802 1856 4991

  • USD: 90 1020 4027 0000 1302 1963 7671
    Transfer title: Order No. {{12345}}
    Your order will ship after we receive your funds.

Cash on Delivery (COD):
Available only if shown at checkout and limited to selected couriers/order values.

👉 Note: We never add surcharges for card payments. All prices shown at checkout are final (including VAT).

2) Payment Timing & Invoices

  • Card / BLIK / Fast transfers: authorized immediately at checkout and charged on dispatch.

  • Bank transfer: please complete payment within 5 business days of order confirmation.

  • A VAT invoice or receipt is sent to your email (and/or included with your parcel).

3) Refunds

  • Refunds are processed via the original payment method (or bank transfer for withdrawals) within 14 days, as per our [Returns & Complaints Policy].

  • Processing times may vary depending on your bank or payment provider

Q: Do you offer free shipping?

A: Yes! We offer free shipping for orders over 250 PLN within Poland and for orders over 250 EUR within the European Union. For all other orders, shipping costs are calculated automatically at checkout based on your delivery method and destination.

Q: How long will my order take?

Orders are processed within 1–2 business days. Delivery in Poland usually takes another 1–2 business days. EU deliveries take about 2–5 business days, while international delivery depends on the destination and carrier.

Q: Do you ship outside Poland?

Online checkout currently supports Poland and selected EU countries. For destinations outside the EU, please contact us directly at orders@localhost

Q: Can I get a VAT invoice?

Yes. Every order can receive a VAT invoice. If you’re a business customer, please enter your company details and NIP (Tax Identification Number) at checkout so the invoice can be issued correctly.

Q: What if my parcel is damaged?

If your parcel looks damaged upon delivery, please note it with the courier and, if possible, request a damage report. Then email us at orders@localhost

Q: What payment methods do you accept?

We accept bank transfers, online card payments, fast transfers via our payment provider, and cash on delivery (where available).

Q: What is your return policy?

You have the right to return your order within 14 days without giving a reason. Please see our Returns & Complaints page for full instructions and downloadable forms. Privacy Policy

title: Terms & Conditions
content_raw:
Terms & Conditions

For Natural Mystic Aroma Shop

At Natural Mystic Aroma, we believe that transparency is just as important as quality.
Our Online Store Regulations are here to give you clear, simple guidance on how we work: how to place an order, how we handle payments, shipping, returns, and your rights as a customer. We want you to shop with confidence, knowing exactly what to expect at every step.

Social-facebook Linkedin Youtube Instagram Social-pinterest Tiktok Whatsapp

§1 General Provisions

  1. The shop at shop.theMysticAroma.com & www.themysticaroma.com/shop operates according to the terms specified in these Regulations.

  2. These Regulations define the conditions for concluding and terminating Product Sale Agreements, the complaint procedure, as well as the types and scope of services provided electronically by the Shop, the rules for providing these services, and the conditions for concluding and terminating agreements for electronic services.

  3. Every Service Recipient, upon commencing activities aimed at using the Electronic Services of the Shop, is obliged to comply with the provisions of these Regulations.

  4. In matters not regulated by these Regulations, the following legal provisions apply:

    • The Act on the Provision of Electronic Services of July 18, 2002,

    • The Consumer Rights Act of May 30, 2014,

    • The Act on Out-of-Court Settlement of Consumer Disputes of September 23, 2016,

    • The Civil Code of April 23, 1964,

    • Other relevant provisions of Polish and EU law.

§2 Definitions

  1. ORDER FORM – a form available on the Shop’s website allowing for the submission of an Order.

  2. CLIENT – a Service Recipient who intends to conclude or has concluded a Product Sale Agreement with the Seller.

  3. CONSUMER – a natural person who performs a legal action with an entrepreneur not directly related to their business or professional activity.

  4. ENTREPRENEUR – a natural person, legal person, or organizational unit without legal personality, granted legal capacity by law, conducting business or professional activity in their name.

  5. PRODUCT – a tangible item available in the Shop, which is the subject of the Sale Agreement between the Client and the Seller.

  6. REGULATIONS – these regulations of the Shop.

  7. SHOP – the online store of the Service Provider operating at the address shop.theMysticAroma.com.

  8. SELLER / SERVICE PROVIDER – Natural Mystic Aroma Sp. z o.o., ul. Pamiątkowa 2/56, 61-512 Poznań, Poland, KRS: 0001039186, NIP: 7831881805, REGON: 525446867, email: info@localhost.

  9. SALE AGREEMENT – a Product Sale Agreement concluded between the Client and the Seller via the Shop.

  10. ORDER – a declaration of will by the Client, constituting an offer to conclude a Product Sale Agreement with the Seller.

  11. PRICE – the value expressed in monetary units, which the Client is obliged to pay the Seller for the Product (gross, including VAT).

§3 Information on Products and Ordering

  1. The Shop sells Products via the Internet.

  2. Products offered in the Shop are new and legally introduced to the Polish and EU market.

  3. Information on the Shop's website does not constitute an offer within the meaning of the law; it is only an invitation to submit an offer by the Client.

  4. By placing an Order, the Client submits an offer to buy a specific Product under the conditions provided in its description.

  5. Prices are displayed in PLN or EUR and include VAT (gross price). Delivery costs are indicated separately during the Order process.

  6. Orders may be placed 24/7 via the Order Form.

  7. Placing an Order requires reading and accepting these Regulations.

§4 Concluding a Sale Agreement

  1. A Sale Agreement is concluded when the Seller confirms the Client’s Order by email.

  2. The confirmation includes essential order details, a withdrawal form, and these Regulations.

  3. Each Sale Agreement is confirmed with proof of purchase (invoice/receipt).

  4. By placing an Order, the Client consents to the processing of their personal data as described in the Shop’s Privacy Policy.

§5 Payment Methods

  1. Available payment methods include:

    • Traditional bank transfer,

    • Online payment systems (card, fast transfer, BLIK, PayPal, etc.),

    • Cash on delivery (if available).

  2. Current payment methods are displayed at checkout.

  3. The Client is obliged to pay within 5 working days of concluding the Sale Agreement, unless otherwise stated.

  4. Orders are processed after payment is received, except when “cash on delivery” is chosen.

§6 Delivery Costs, Time, and Methods

  1. Delivery costs are indicated during checkout and are borne by the Client.

  2. Delivery times consist of:

    • Preparation time: up to 2 working days,

    • Shipping time: depends on the chosen carrier (typically 2 working days within Poland, longer for other EU countries).

  3. Deliveries are made only within the European Union.

  4. In case of delays or exceptional circumstances, the Seller will inform the Client to set a new delivery date.

  5. Upon receipt, the Client should, if possible, check the shipment and prepare a damage report with the courier if necessary.

§7 Product Complaints

  1. The Seller is liable for Product conformity under the Consumer Rights Act (2014).

  2. Consumers may file a complaint via email to info@localhost or by post to the Seller’s address.

  3. Complaints should include order details, description of the defect, and preferred resolution.

  4. The Seller responds within 14 days.

  5. Possible resolutions include:

    • Repair or replacement of the Product,

    • Price reduction with partial refund,

    • Withdrawal from the agreement and full refund.

  6. A Complaint Form is available on the Shop’s website to simplify the process.

§8 Right of Withdrawal

  1. Consumers have the right to withdraw from a remote Sale Agreement within 14 days without giving a reason.

  2. The withdrawal period is counted from the day the Client (or a designated third party) receives the Product.

  3. The Consumer bears the cost of returning the Product.

  4. Refunds (including delivery costs) are made within 14 days of receiving the withdrawal notice, using the same payment method unless agreed otherwise.

  5. Exceptions: withdrawal does not apply to goods prepared to the Consumer’s specifications or perishable items.

§9 Types and Scope of Electronic Services

  1. The Shop enables the use of Electronic Services, including placing Orders and managing user accounts.

  2. Services are provided free of charge, under the conditions specified in these Regulations.

  3. The Service Provider may place advertising content within the Shop.

§10 Conditions for Electronic Services

  1. Technical requirements: internet-enabled device, browser, email, cookies enabled.

  2. Service Recipients must use the Shop lawfully and provide accurate data.

  3. Unlawful content is prohibited.

§11 Complaints Related to Electronic Services

  1. Complaints about electronic services can be sent to info@localhost.

  2. The Seller will respond within 14 days.

§12 Personal Data

  1. The Seller processes personal data in compliance with GDPR.

  2. Detailed rules are set out in the Shop’s Privacy Policy.

  3. Providing data is voluntary, but necessary for fulfilling orders.

§13 Final Provisions

  1. Agreements are concluded under Polish and EU law.

  2. Disputes will first be resolved amicably; if not, through competent courts.

  3. Consumers may use mediation, arbitration, consumer ombudsmen, or the EU ODR platform (http://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/).

necessary.§7 Product ComplaintsThe Seller is liable for Product conformity under the Consumer Rights Act (2014).Consumers may file a complaint via email to info@localhost or by post to the Seller’s address.Complaints should include order details, description of the defect, and preferred resolution.The Seller responds within 14 days.Possible resolutions include:Repair or replacement of the Product,Price reduction with partial refund,Withdrawal from the agreement and full refund.A Complaint Form is available on the Shop’s website to simplify the process.§8 Right of WithdrawalConsumers have the right to withdraw from a remote Sale Agreement within 14 days without giving a reason.The withdrawal period is counted from the day the Client (or a designated third party) receives the Product.The Consumer bears the cost of returning the Product.Refunds (including delivery costs) are made within 14 days of receiving the withdrawal notice, using the same payment method unless agreed otherwise.Exceptions: withdrawal does not apply to goods prepared to the Consumer’s specifications or perishable items.§9 Types and Scope of Electronic ServicesThe Shop enables the use of Electronic Services, including placing Orders and managing user accounts.Services are provided free of charge, under the conditions specified in these Regulations.The Service Provider may place advertising content within the Shop.§10 Conditions for Electronic ServicesTechnical requirements: internet-enabled device, browser, email, cookies enabled.Service Recipients must use the Shop lawfully and provide accurate data.Unlawful content is prohibited.§11 Complaints Related to Electronic ServicesComplaints about electronic services can be sent to info@localhost.The Seller will respond within 14 days.§12 Personal DataThe Seller processes personal data in compliance with GDPR.Detailed rules are set out in the Shop’s Privacy Policy.Providing data is voluntary, but necessary for fulfilling orders.§13 Final ProvisionsAgreements are concluded under Polish and EU law.Disputes will first be resolved amicably; if not, through competent courts.Consumers may use mediation, arbitration, consumer ombudsmen, or the EU ODR platform (http://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/).
